chain_label: Policy creation → procurement corridor → personnel continuity → commercial deployment

stages.note: Clifford authors the commissioned AI Opportunities Action Plan; government accepts and operationalizes it.

Detachment 201 commissions senior technology-company executives (Palantir, OpenAI) as Army Reserve officers, occupying the strategic/procurement corridor. Award IDs/amounts not yet confirmed; reported/structural.
The synthetic-population / modelled-input logic is built inside No. 10 government machinery, then carried by the same personnel into the private sector.
The same logic is commercialized as synthetic-audience infrastructure and deployed at a named customer (News UK), substituting modelled feedback for real consultation.

why_no_hop: No bounded surface carries shared Matt Clifford co-participation across these stages. The stages are connected by policy lineage and a procurement corridor, not by co-presence. Clifford Numbers for the actors involved are therefore unchanged by this chain. The chain expresses structural position only and must never be read as a hop or as guilt by association.
